summary: Application Form Extraction feature fully tested. Backend endpoints exist and respond correctly. Frontend shows Extract button in Personal Details card, extraction dialog with loading state, and proper error handling when no application form exists. Compliance calculations confirmed unchanged by profile field updates.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Returns 404/422 with appropriate error when no application form
✅ Backend: POST /api/extractions/{id}/apply endpoint exists (returns 404 for non-existent)
✅ Backend: POST /api/extractions/{id}/discard endpoint exists (returns 404 for non-existent)
✅ Backend: Extended profile fields (address_line_1, city, postcode, ni_number, next_of_kin_name, etc.) accepted in PUT /api/employees/{id}
✅ Backend: Extended profile fields persist correctly after update
✅ Backend: Compliance percentage unchanged after profile field update (95% before and after)
✅ Backend: Compliance requirements structure includes requirements, statuses, work_readiness
✅ Frontend: 'Extract from App Form' button visible in Personal Details card on Overview tab
✅ Frontend: Button has data-testid='extract-from-app-btn' for testing
✅ Frontend: Clicking button opens 'Review Extracted Data' dialog
✅ Frontend: Dialog shows loading state with spinner and 'Extracting data from application form...'
✅ Frontend: Dialog shows compliance note: 'This updates profile data only. Compliance evidence requirements remain unchanged.'
✅ Frontend: Error toast shown when extraction fails: 'Could not extract text from document. Please ensure the document is readable.'
✅ Frontend: Dialog has table with columns: Apply, Field, Extracted Value, Current Value, Confidence
✅ Frontend: Dialog has Select All, Select Empty Only, Clear All quick actions
✅ Frontend: Dialog has Discard and Apply buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Backend extraction endpoints at lines 3489-3769 properly implement extract, apply, and discard flows
Backend uses GPT-5.2 vision for OCR extraction (lines 3377-3401)
Backend EXTRACTABLE_PROFILE_FIELDS list at lines 3333-3342 covers all expected fields
Backend apply_extraction explicitly notes it does NOT affect compliance (lines 3655-3661)
Frontend extraction dialog at lines 6097-6253 has proper loading, error, and success states
Frontend Extract button at lines 2713-2726 in Personal Details card with proper data-testid
Frontend FIELD_LABELS mapping at lines 1430-1462 provides human-readable field names
context_for_next_testing_agent: Application Form Extraction feature verified. The feature uses GPT-5.2 vision to extract text from uploaded application forms and parse into profile fields. Backend endpoints: POST /api/employees/{id}/extract-from-application, POST /api/extractions/{id}/apply, POST /api/extractions/{id}/discard. Frontend shows Extract button in Personal Details card (Overview tab). To test full extraction flow, upload an application form document for an employee first, then click Extract. The test employee (d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77) has no application form uploaded, so extraction returns 422 error - this is expected behavior.
